2.0 Violation Details

MEDIUM VIO-001 SBC Ref: 41-3.3.4

Visible flexible cable/cord run without concealed sections in damage-prone areas

Bounding box detected at region
Description Coiled electrical cables lying on the floor, some with exposed ends.
SBC Code 41-3.3.4 — Flexible cables and cords in separated circuits shall be visible throughout any part of their length liable to mechanical damage.
Priority MEDIUM
MEDIUM VIO-002 SBC Ref: 704:52-2.8.101

Mechanical protection for cables crossing construction site roads/walkways

Bounding box detected at region
Description Coiled electrical cables lying on the floor, some with exposed ends.
SBC Code 704:52-2.8.101 — Cables should not be run across site roads or walkways. Where necessary, special protection against mechanical damage shall be provided.
Priority MEDIUM
